goal: Implement a login screen and authentication

subtasks.title: Create the login UI component
subtasks.dod: An email/password input form and a submit button are displayed

subtasks.title: Implement the authentication API endpoint
subtasks.dod: POST /auth/login returns a JWT for valid credentials

subtasks.title: Session management and protected routes
subtasks.dod: Unauthenticated users cannot access protected pages

subtasks.title: Add tests for the authentication flow
subtasks.dod: Login success/failure cases are covered by automated tests

risk_notes: Check consistency with the existing user database schema
Match the password hashing method to the project standard
